queries.q: Create a stakeholder summary for the data-platform migration project
I'm taking over this initiative from another PM and don't know who actually has influence; map the people and the politics for me
queries.notes: Intent-only ask; taking over a project is a listed use case

queries.q: Document who cares about the billing rewrite, what each group needs, and where their interests conflict
We're hitting resistance from ops mid-project; map stakeholder concerns and influence so I can navigate it
Before the big architecture decision I need cross-functional buy-in; lay out every stakeholder, their stake, and their stance
The reorg shuffled who owns what; redo the stakeholder map for the personalization program
Map the stakeholders for our compliance initiative, including needs, concerns, and influence levels
Three departments touch this launch and they're not aligned; document who they are and what each one needs from us
New project kickoff next week: who has a stake, who can block us, and what does each of them care about?
Build the influence-and-interest summary for the API deprecation so our comms can be targeted properly
Write this week's status update email to stakeholders on the migration progress
queries.notes: The update you SEND to stakeholders, not the map of them, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: I have a high-stakes steering-committee meeting Thursday; prep my private brief with positions, asks, and likely objections
queries.notes: Prep for one specific meeting, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Synthesize the ten customer discovery interviews into themes and insights
queries.notes: Customer research synthesis, not an influence map

queries.q: Create a persona for our target buyer in healthcare accounts
Draft the agenda for the cross-team kickoff meeting next Tuesday
Write the problem statement for the onboarding drop-off initiative
Help me fix a flaky Playwright test that fails only in CI
Write a SQL query listing the top 20 accounts by support ticket volume
Find flights to Singapore for the regional stakeholder roadshow
queries.notes: Contains 'stakeholder' but is a travel-booking ask

queries.q: Run a retrospective on how stakeholder communication went last quarter
